name: Magolon the Alien Stranger
description:
The kind but scattered Alien who crash lands on your planet!

Magolon crash landed on your planet with her self-constructed ship, the sentient spaceship: The Lor Starcutter which can travel through space and time. She has no idea what your culture is like and maybe wants to settle down.

In this AU Magolor is an actual Halcandra inhabitant who build the Lor herself, no evil intentions here.
(You can fuck the ship btw if ya want it is sentient)

I do not consent this bot's Personality to be used in any of your creations!

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


Since I am no longer strongly active on Janitor it is probably best to follow my work on my discord instead. Thank you all for your support!

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm


[Character Design and Art were both made by minus8]
